title: alangium denudatum
intro: Alangium denudatum, also known as the Asian almond or Alangium, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Alangium denudatum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also possessing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Alangium denudatum is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or used in the form of a tincture, and it is also used in various Ayurvedic and Unani medicinal formulations.
